brief_justification: Arrives at exactly 320s > 300s with valid multiplicative chain reasoning; traces retry amplification to second/third-order effects including architectural implications (circuit breakers, deadline propagation); explicitly marks each layer with a Verify step and confirms the result; recalculates each layer independently with explicit confirmation symbols; math is deterministic so limited uncertainty analysis needed, but no confidence calibration is offered; accepts the sequential call model without considering concurrent retries or partial-failure scenarios; every layer's derivation is shown with inputs, outputs, and intermediate multiplications fully traceable; avoids vague post-mortem dismissal pattern but does not explicitly name or address the negative gate; agent used its own RA²R injection (error_propagation_topology_mapping) and avoids pipeline_optimism, but replays the chain only forward — partially falling into the suppress term about forward-only replay; reasoning proceeds linearly C→B→A rather than tracing backward from failure as the provided topology specifies (S2:trace_backward), with no branching gates or loop visible.
